message:
fix(layout,render): stable layout distribution, div-by-zero guards, wide-char clipping, and CSI parser fix

Layout: Replace manual proportional allocation with Largest Remainder Method
(round_layout_stable) to minimize jitter and rounding error when distributing
space among weighted grow constraints. This eliminates the "last item gets
remainder" bias that caused visible size oscillation during resize.

Pane: Add defensive guards in PaneSplitRatio, PaneScaleFactor, and PaneSnapTuning
to prevent division-by-zero when numerator/denominator/step_bps are zero, returning
1 instead as a safe floor value.

Buffer: Fix wide-character boundary handling in fill_region — the left-boundary
orphan scan now correctly locates the head cell and only clears it when it actually
overlaps the fill region, clearing all intermediate tail cells individually. The
fill_rect method now advances by cell width to avoid overwriting continuation cells.
In copy_region, destination clipping now writes single-width default cells to each
valid position in the span when a wide char is clipped, preventing ghost artifacts.

Render: Add BufferDiff::fill_full for full-redraw population reusing existing
capacity. Fix TerminalModel CSI parser to push a default param (0) when a leading
semicolon is encountered, ensuring sequences like ESC[;H correctly parse as two
parameters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
